shell.blurb: Inspect, restart and update every compose project on this host — locally or over MCP — from a single dense panel.
shell.footerSetup: // no users on host — bootstrap required

login.title: Sign in to continue
login.subtitle: Authenticate with your operator credentials to reach the host.
login.hint: Lost your password? An admin can reset it from the Users page after signing in. The MCP endpoint uses its own bearer tokens — issue them from Tokens once logged in.

setup.title: Bootstrap your operator
setup.subtitle: No accounts exist on this host yet. Create the first administrator below — they will own user management and MCP token issuance.
setup.hint: This is a one-time setup. After creation, you will land in the dashboard signed in. Subsequent users are added from the Users page (admin only).

errors.passwordTooShort: password must be at least 8 characters
